verses.text: A man who vows must keep his word. Vows. A promise to God binds.
A man who vows must keep his word. Vows. A promise to God binds.
A young woman's vow stands unless her father disallows it. The father. Headship may annul.
A young woman's vow stands unless her father disallows it. The father. Headship may annul.
A young woman's vow stands unless her father disallows it. The father. Headship may annul.
A wife's vow stands unless her husband disallows it. The husband. He may confirm or void.
A wife's vow stands unless her husband disallows it. The husband. He may confirm or void.
A wife's vow stands unless her husband disallows it. The husband. He may confirm or void.
A widow's or divorced woman's vow stands. On her own. She bears her own word.
A wife's vow in her husband's house may be confirmed or made void. Confirmed. His silence binds it.
A wife's vow in her husband's house may be confirmed or made void. Confirmed. His silence binds it.
A wife's vow in her husband's house may be confirmed or made void. Confirmed. His silence binds it.
If he annuls it later, he bears her iniquity. Accountable. Delay shifts the guilt.
If he annuls it later, he bears her iniquity. Accountable. Delay shifts the guilt.
If he annuls it later, he bears her iniquity. Accountable. Delay shifts the guilt.
These are the statutes of vows. The statutes. God orders the keeping of promises.
